body:
## Summary
Fixes the bug where saving cupping notes doesn't refresh the UI data (tasting radar and rating). Also reduces the visual distraction of background lines in the tasting radar chart.

## Changes
- **BeanProfileTabs.svelte**: After a successful cupping save, perform an immediate fetch of the full bean (with catalog join) before calling onUpdate. This ensures AI tasting notes aren't lost and the UI reflects the new rating/notes without a manual refresh.
- **TastingNotesRadar.svelte**: Reduced opacity of concentric grid circles (0.3 -> 0.1) and axis lines (0.5 -> 0.2) to make the data points more prominent.
- Added processingUpdate state to handleCuppingSave for consistent loading behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] User saves cupping notes; radar chart immediately shows updated user tasting notes
- [x] User saves cupping notes; overall rating (rank) displayed in the header area reflects the new value without page reload
- [x] AI tasting notes overlay is preserved after user notes save
- [x] Background grid lines in radar chart are lighter and less distracting

Related Plan: notes/implementation-plans/2026-03-13-cupping-notes-reactive-refresh.md
title: feat: cupping notes reactive refresh and tasting radar visual cleanup
